name: Wheat Free Healthy Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Apple pie spice or ground cinnamon
1/2 cup Fresh apple, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together millet, rice flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, arrowroot, and apple pie spice (or ground cinnamon).
2. In a separate bowl, mix together applesauce, apple juice concentrate, egg whites, and water until blended.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until fully combined.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle with vegetable oil.
5. Pour less than 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the hot surface.
6. Cook until the pancakes have bubbly surfaces and dry edges, then turn and cook until golden brown. Make 4 pancakes, each about 4 inches in size.
From Barbara Luboff, L.A. Dietitian with a wheat sensitivity.
